titleStmt.title: SII 38.491: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 491. (A.R. No. 491 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the south wall, maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine, Siddharatnēśvara temple.

summary.p: Damaged. Records the gift of two vēli of land to the god of Tiruūṟṟattūr, Tugumāmaṇiy-āṇḍār by three persons 1. Maḻavar alias Nāṟpatteṇṇāyira Nambi, the son of a Veḷḷāḷa Iḷamālvāy-uḍaiyāṉ, 2. Dēvaṉ Kumaraṉ, the nephew of the former and Rāsaṉ Nambi, the younger brother of Dēvaṉ Kumaraṉ, the residents of Karuviḍaimaṅgalam, a dēvadāna village of Tiruvālanduṟai-uḍaiya Mahādēva temple at Śiṟupaḻuvūr in Kuṉṟa-kkūṟṟam. Missing nāḍu, (a sub-division) of Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, by Uḍaiyāṉ Perumāḷ Tiruvāliyāṇḍān of Maṅgalanallūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kaṭalcūḻnta pārEḻun ticaieṭṭuṅkāttu niṉṟu taṭamāmati Ena viḷakkit tiraḷa veṇkoṭaiRead kuṭainilāveṟippa Āḻivarai varampāka vaṭaṟkaliyaip pelattokki Ūḻi
toṟum pukaḻoṅki Orāḻi veyilpparappa kayaṟcilaiyil kālvaḷaiyak kaḷiṟāḷiyil karaṅkuvippa puyalāḻiyil poṟṟi ceyyap puvimeruvil viṟṟiruppat tiruvāṇaiyuñ ceṅko
lun ticaieṭṭuṅ kāvalkoḷḷap peruvāḻvu peṟṟuyiranaittum piḻaitta tāmenak kaḷikūra camaiyamāṟunta talai Eṭuppat tarumamu marumaṟaiyun taḻaittoṅka vamaivillā manu
Oḻukkamātiyukamāmpaṭi nilainiṟkka Oṟpil tammuṟu kanavilum Onṟoṭoṉṟu pakaivinṟi poṟpuviyum pulvāyum pukkoru tuṟai nīruṭaṇṇap ponti netiyum poyyātu puyilum puṉalo
karavātu manniya neti vaḷam peruviḷai vayaltoṟum vaḷañ curappa poka pūmiyitu vennap pokamellām vantiṇṭi Eka(ka)vāṇai Aracurimai Eḻil poḻilkaḷum peṟṟatena(na)paṭi vāḻa muṭicūṭi
yātta marāpiṣekat talaittaracar kaḷittāṭa Evvulakamiruḷ niṅka vanta komanivanenṟu kavvai tira kaḷiRead kalikāttāti kālāṅ kāṭṭina Ena Ivan kākkum puviyanaittu miyāvaiyu ninaintaruḷiyavan
kākkum Ena Akilalokaṅkaḷālaṭiyaṭaik kulaipaṭuvana teṅkukaḷe koḷpaṭuvana Iḷaṅkamukey paṭuvana tirinilai E(y)tir paṭuvana viṭi Eṟe kaḷampaṭuvaṉa por varampe kaṭaipaṭuvana kopurame Uḷampaṭuvana cūn kaḷire
Oṟuppuṇ paṉa matakkaḷiṟe taṭuppuṇpana koṭṭakame taḷḷuṇpanaDo kaḷḷuṇpana cetakarame koṭu ceṟṟa kalaipporuḷe komavan vuttamip poruḷe kaṭṭuṇpana neṭuṅ koṭie kaṟaipaṭuvana niṟaimatiye ṇpana vaṇiyaṉ kule rina
tāṟṟuva pariyākame kuṟaipaṭuka curuḷe kuḻaivillana maṇikkoṅkaie maṟaipaṭuvana cūḻ kāñcie māl kovana vaṇaṅkiṭai E Enṟu pāṭimap pārventariḷaṅ kaḷiṟṟin mel potac cenṟiṟaiñci por
(r) venta tiruvācaṟ puṟaniṟpac ceralarun tennavaru ciṅkaḷarum koṅkaḷarumRead koṅkaṇarumperaracu peṟa veṇṭip piriyātu cevippa tammaracu tāmpeṟṟu tammuṭane muṭicūṭiyam maruṅkuṟa teviyarkaḷaṇimaṅkalam peṟṟa tennavāḷaracar talaikākka yātavarkula marapil
vanta coḻakula maṇiviḷakku coḻakulamāṇikkam puṟakaṇi mutaṟ kaṇ nānkin vaṭivukoṇṭa vaḷava cekaran tiruvāṇaiyumuṭa nāṇaiyum muṭancella muṭikkavittāṉ maṇṇaracar vantiṟaiñci makuṭam punai vaḷavanuṭan peṇṇaracum peruntāyamum peṟṟaruḷum perumāḷ
Uṟaiyūrum peruntakaiyumu(t) takaiyu maturāpuriyu mu muṟai E peṟu(m) mulaip perumāḷ muḷarinakar tuṟanta vannam poṉācanañ ciṅkavaṇai polu kaṟpakap pūñcolaiyil munnevalu nittal muḷai pāṇṭaruḷi Āḷkai
tam poṟkuḻaik kompenna Ulaku makiḻa vantaruḷiya Ulakuṭai mukkoṟkiḻānaṭiyuṭan viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirācakecaripaṟmarāna tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ si Irācāti
maṅkalanallūruṭaiyān perumāḷ tiruvāliyāṇṭānen Irācarācavaḷanāṭṭu tiruvūṟṟattūrnāṭṭu tiruvūṟṟattūruṭaiyār tukumāmaṇināyanār Āticaṇṭecurarkku nān tānamākak kuṭutta paricāvatu piramātarāya muttaraiyar pakkal I
Digital edition of SII 38.491 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
